description: build_request returns '<METHOD> <PATH> HTTP/1.1'; parse_request splits a line and returns [method, path]; status_text maps 200/301/403/404/500 to their words.
build_request and parse_request are exact inverses (build then parse gives back the method and path); status_text returns 'Unknown' for unrecognized codes.
Clear string building (spaces in the right places); parse_request reads the first two tokens; a return on every path.
